subject: Re: Final Revised Letter
body:
mr epstein was quite dismayed that you would make such threats,  having never spoken to him before.


----- Original Message ----
From: "DKIESQ@aol.com" <DKIESQ@aol.com>
To: jeeproject@yahoo.com
Sent: Friday, November 16, 2007 1:11:09 PM
Subject: Final Revised Letter


Final Revision attached for your approval.
 
Darren K. Indyke
Attorney-At-Law
457 Madison Avenue
4th Floor
New York, New York 10022
Tel: 212-750-1176
Fax: 212-750-0381
e-mail: dkiesq@aol.com

Each taxpayer should seek advice based on the taxpayer's particular circumstances from an independent tax advisor.
